items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the prerequisite dependency rules.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the prerequisite dependency rules, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm the existence or implementation of these rules. The linked use case mentions the need for prerequisite dependency rules but lacks concrete evidence of their validation. Therefore, the assessment is inconclusive due to the absence of necessary evidence to support the requirement.
